source_pr.title: stats: use feedback in time
source_pr.body:
This PR update statistic tables by local feedback periodically. 
Currently, we dump the feedback with the period of 10 min, so it takes 10 min for an feedback to take effect.  However, we can use the feedback locally, so it could be used more timely.
PTAL @lamxTyler @coocood

symptoms: fix possible nil pointer and data race
failure_signature: fix possible nil pointer and data race
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky under `-race` because statistics feedback application mutated shared histogram/CMSketch structures in-place (and could hit nil CMSketch), leading to concurrent access races and potential panics. This PR fixes it by adding nil checks and updating stats via copy-on-write (copy index/column stats before mutating and swapping back), avoiding concurrent mutation of shared objects.
fix_pattern: Avoid in-place mutation of shared stats objects; use copy-on-write and nil guards to prevent concurrent data races.

evidence: evidence: fix possible nil pointer and data race

files: domain/domain.go, statistics/handle.go, statistics/update.go, statistics/update_test.go, statistics/feedback.go, statistics/histogram.go, statistics/handle_test.go, statistics/cmsketch.go, statistics/feedback_test.go, statistics/table.go
